extraction.one_line_summary: SENESCHAL Florian won after teammate Jakobsen abandoned with mechanical/issue, Deceuninck lead-out so fast it dropped their own sprinter.
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck's lead-out speed (over 40mph entering final corner) was so extreme it dropped their designated sprinter Jakobsen.
Time gaps opened on flat sprint finish: 6 seconds to Bernal group, 11-13 seconds to red jersey despite no climb.
Deceuninck continued full lead-out after recognizing Jakobsen's mechanical rather than soft-pedaling, showing tactical discipline even without main asset.

rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: mechanical or issue forced abandon in final 2km despite being in green jersey and perfectly positioned
rider_signals.SENESCHAL Florian: positive: domestique capitalized on unexpected opportunity, showing sprinters don't just work they finish when needed
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: neutral: on third wheel in optimal position with 1km to go but couldn't convert against domestique
rider_signals.DEMARE Arnaud: negative: dropped by Deceuninck's tempo before final kilometer on flat sprint stage reveals lack of positioning discipline
